# startStdioServer()

```ts
function startStdioServer(server: McpServer): Promise<void>;
```

Defined in: [transport/stdio/stdio.ts:25](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/4112cd2ee9b9b05525039f4b7b060594d2aa7744/src/app/transport/stdio/stdio.ts#L25)

Starts the stdio transport for local MCP integration.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type        | Description                                    |
| --------- | ----------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `server`  | `McpServer` | The configured MCP server instance to connect. |

## Returns

`Promise`<`void`>

## Remarks

Uses `StdioServerTransport` for local communication, typically
invoked when the `--stdio` flag is passed. Designed for VS Code MCP
client integration via `.vscode/mcp.json`.

## Example

```ts
const server = createMcpServer(config);
await startStdioServer(server);
```
